title: Ball's clutch drive saves Hornets in frantic finish
content: LaMelo Ball made the go-ahead bucket with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, and Miles Bridges sealed it with a block at the buzzer to propel the Hornets and oust the Heat in Tuesday night's play-in game.

title: Spo: Ball should've been tossed for Adebayo trip
content: Heat center Bam Adebayo suffered a lower back injury after a fall in the second quarter and was ruled out in the second half.

title: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed
content: Deni Avdija scored 41 points to help the Blazers erase an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter and top the Suns 114-110 and secure the No. 7 seed in the Western Conference playoffs.

title: Sources: Giants' talks with Lawrence hit impasse
content: The Giants and star defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II have reached an impasse on talks over a new contract extension, sources told NFL Network on Tuesday night.

title: Duran: Obscene gesture due to fan crossing line
content: Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran directed an obscene gesture toward a fan who he said told him to "kill myself" during Boston's loss to the Twins on Tuesday.

title: Jackets coach torches players: 'They don't care'
content: Blue Jackets coach Rick Bowness questioned his players' desire to win after an uninspiring season-ending loss to the Capitals.

title: Undecided Ovi hears chants of 'One more year!'
content: Alex Ovechkin, who assisted on Jakob Chychrun's go-ahead goal during the third period of the Washington Capitals' 2-1 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets in the season finale Tuesday, heard chants of "One more year!" from fans during the final minute.

title: J. Cole ends stint with Chinese pro hoops team
content: Rap megastar J. Cole said Tuesday that his time playing professional basketball in China has come to an end after one game.

content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

content: Liverpool's Champions League journey ended with a whimper Tuesday at the hands of a clinical Paris Saint-Germain.

content: Get to know more about Stephanie McMahon, AJ Styles, Demolition, and others before the Hall of Fame event Friday.

content: Tottenham are really bad and looking at the way this team has been constructed, one thing clearly stands out: This team is really bad at passing the ball, and that may explain their present malaise.

content: Lisandro Martinez was sent off on Monday for pulling the hair of Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin.

content: What can we expect next from Rory McIlroy? Who disappointed at the Masters? Will Scottie Scheffler add to his major total this year? We answer some big questions following the 2026 Masters.

title: UCLA baseball team to don retro No. 42 tribute uniforms ahead of Jackie Robinson Day
content: The barrier-breaking MLB legend played four sports at UCLA, and the presently top-ranked Bruins baseball team will honor his legacy Tuesday with throwback threads.

title: The Florida Gators are stacked with talent -- and aiming for the title
content: Last year, Florida was stunned in the NCAA gymnastics semifinals. This year, the Gators have unmatched depth -- and Tim Tebow's words of inspiration.

content: Legwold and the late McGinnis formed a bond over combine breakfasts, large trucks, makeshift wallets and bobbleheads.

content: Tracking news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern eye move for Newcastle's Gordon
content: Bayern Munich are reportedly looking to sign Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Bihar's first BJP CM: Samrat Choudhary takes oath
content: Samrat Choudhary has been sworn in as Bihar's new Chief Minister, marking the BJP's first leader to hold the state's top post. This transition follows Nitish Kumar's departure after over two decades of leadership. Choudhary, a prominent OBC face and former deputy CM, previously served in various parties before joining the BJP in 2017.

title: ED raids AAP MP Ashok Mittal’s home after he replaces Raghav Chadha in Rajya Sabha
content: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) raided the residence of AAP Rajya Sabha MP Ashok Kumar Mittal just days after his appointment as the party's deputy leader in the Upper House. This action follows a recent leadership reshuffle within the AAP's Rajya Sabha contingent, where Mittal replaced Raghav Chadha. Mittal, the founder of Lovely Professional University, entered politics in 2022.

title: No ships got through in first 24 hrs: How US is enforcing a sweeping blockade on Iranian ports
content: US forces have imposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports, halting all maritime trade in and out of the country.  Over 10,000 personnel and numerous warships are enforcing the operation, impacting vessels of all nations.  This move escalates regional tensions, with global energy markets already feeling the strain.

title: How a 'long chat' with MS Dhoni helped Noor Ahmad dismantle KKR, CSK coach reveals
content: Noor delivered a match-winning performance with figures of 3/21 in four overs as Chennai Super Kings defeated Kolkata Knight Riders in their IPL 2026 match on Tuesday. He played a key role in breaking the middle order as Kolkata lost control of the chase.

title: Ajinkya Rahane fined Rs 12 lakh after KKR's fourth loss in IPL 2026
content: In the match, Noor Ahmad returned figures of 3/21 as Chennai Super Kings beat Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs to register their second win in a row.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office: Ranveer Singh’s film heads to beat ‘Pushpa 2’ in week 4
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' continues its impressive box office run, now in its fourth week. The film has secured the third-highest week 4 collection in India, surpassing 'Chaava' and is on track to challenge 'Pushpa 2's' record. Its global earnings have reached over Rs 1,727 crore.

title: Anthropic cofounder says degrees that seemed mismatch to age of AI are now worthwhile
content: Anthropic cofounder Jack Clark highlighted the growing relevance of liberal arts degrees in the AI era, emphasizing how understanding history and narratives aids in comprehending future technology. He noted that interdisciplinary synthesis and critical thinking, rather than just rote programming, are becoming crucial skills for navigating AI's complexities.

title: Yash's Ravana costume revealed; actor confirms 'no scenes' with Ranbir
content: CinemaCon 2026 unveiled striking costumes for 'Ramayana: Part One', featuring Yash's elaborate Ravana armour, Ranbir Kapoor's regal Lord Rama, and Sai Pallavi's simple Sita avatar.  Surprisingly, Yash confirmed he and Kapoor do not share any scenes in the first instalment, focusing on their separate kingdoms. Both actors expressed mutual respect and a shared vision for the ambitious project.

title: Delhi-Dehradun expressway inaugurated, but a house still holds up Loni ramp plan
content: A legal dispute over 1,600 sqm of land in Loni's Mandola is delaying a crucial ramp for the newly inaugurated Delhi-Saharanpur-Dehradun Economic Corridor. The unresolved compensation claim, dating back to 1998, has left a key stretch unfinished, creating an accident-prone area and impacting local connectivity.

title: 4 MP cops sleep on hospital bed, pee in dustbin, suspended
content: Four on-duty policemen in Sidhi, Madhya Pradesh, have been suspended after a video emerged showing them sleeping on a patient's bed and urinating in a hospital dustbin. The officers, guarding an undertrial prisoner, were reportedly heavily intoxicated. An inquiry confirmed their misconduct, raising serious questions about discipline within the force during sensitive duties.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: Vijay’s Tiruppur rally called off after 15 faint in scorching heat
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam president Vijay's rally in Tiruppur was cancelled after at least 15 supporters collapsed due to severe heat and overcrowding. The decision was made following police advice to prevent a repeat of the Karur stampede, with Vijay departing for Coimbatore.

title: US Navy destroyer intercepts two oil tankers trying to leave Hormuz; orders them to turn back
content: A US Navy destroyer intercepted two oil tankers leaving Iran, marking the initial phase of a US-declared blockade aimed at pressuring Tehran. Despite the blockade, some Iran-linked vessels reportedly transited the Strait of Hormuz. Experts caution about the blockade's effectiveness and warn of potential escalation and retaliation from Iran.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 opens above 24,200; BSE Sensex rallies over 1,200 points
content: Stock market today: Sensex and Nifty50 rallied strongly in trade on Wednesday after optimism surrounding renewed US-Iran peace talks led oil prices to drop. While Nifty50 went above 24,200, BSE Sensex rose over 1,200 points.

title: 3 players, one crown: How can India's Vaishali win Women's Candidates at eleventh hour?
content: In the running for the title, there are three contenders: India’s Vaishali Rameshbabu, Kazakhstan's Bibisara Assaubayeva, and China’s Zhu Jiner. Vaishali and Bibisara currently lead with 7.5/13 points, followed by Jiner on 7/13. The math is simple yet somewhat disquieting. If Vaishali and Bibisara both win their final games, they head into a tie-break on Thursday.

title: Happy Vishu 2026: Top 50 wishes, images, messages to celebrate Malayalam new year
content: Kerala celebrates Vishu on April 15, 2026, marking the Malayalam New Year with a focus on renewal and prosperity. The festival emphasizes the significance of the Vishukkani, the first auspicious sights at dawn, believed to shape the year ahead. Families gather to welcome fresh beginnings, fostering hope, abundance, and gratitude for a successful and joyful year.

title: Delhi fire: 3, including toddler, dead as massive blaze tears through Rohini shanties
content: A devastating fire ripped through a Rohini shanty settlement early Wednesday. A couple and their three-year-old daughter perished in the blaze. Firefighters battled the flames for hours. The fire spread rapidly due to plastic waste. Several shanties were destroyed. Investigations into the cause are underway.

title: Higher Trump tariffs soon? US treasury secy Bessent says rates could be restored by July
content: Trump is attempting to rebuild his tariff regime using alternative legal avenues after the court ruled that his earlier reliance on emergency powers to impose duties was unconstitutional.

title: Oil prices today: Crude steadies after slump as US, Iran eye fresh peace talks
content: Oil prices dipped for a second day as hopes for US-Iran talks eased supply worries. Brent crude futures fell to $94.27, and WTI to $90.24, though later saw a slight uptick. Diplomatic signals suggest negotiations might restart, potentially impacting flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: ‘Why did top cop share stage with Ashok Kharat?’: Activist flags Nashik godman link
content: Activist Anjali Damania has demanded a probe into a senior Nashik police officer's presence at an event with accused godman Ashok Kharat, citing 18 linked calls. Meanwhile, a Congress MP fears an "encounter" killing as the investigation into Kharat's sexual assault and cheating cases expands, potentially implicating ruling party members. The Maharashtra minister urged cooperation with the probe.

title: From highway blockades to arson and arrests, how wage protests spread across Haryana, UP
content: Protests over minimum wage implementation intensified across Haryana and Uttar Pradesh. Factory workers blocked roads and clashed with police in industrial hubs like Faridabad and Palwal. Workers demanded enforcement of revised minimum wages, alleging exploitative conditions. Authorities attributed the agitation to misinformation and are taking action against those involved. The situation is now under control.

title: Rockets, drones & missiles: Can Hezbollah sustain a full-scale war with Israel?
content: The Israel-Lebanon border is tense as Hezbollah, despite Israeli efforts, demonstrates operational capability and strategic patience. Its dual power structure with the Lebanese Armed Forces and a sophisticated, adaptable arsenal, including extensive small arms, anti-tank systems, and rocket artillery, presents a significant challenge. This resilience shapes Lebanon's military leverage against Israel, creating a volatile balance.

title: Is the Iran war ending? Trump signals hope for fresh talks, but says 'we’re not finished'
content: US President Donald Trump stated that the war with Iran is "very close to being over" as new peace talks are set to begin. He believes Iran "wants to make a deal very badly," despite the US not being finished with its objectives. This comes after initial talks stalled over Tehran's nuclear program, leading to a US naval blockade of Iranian ports.

title: Travis Kelce’s ring for Taylor Swift sparks antique diamond trend
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have reignited interest in antique diamonds, shifting focus from flawless, mass-produced stones to rare, character-rich pieces. Their engagement spotlighted vintage craftsmanship, sustainability, and uniqueness. Jewellers report rising demand, though high-quality antique diamonds remain scarce and costly. As buyers seek meaning over perfection, these historic stones are becoming prized choices, blending romance, heritage, and individuality in modern engagement trends.

title: Floyd Mayweather hit with $100k lawsuit amid $7million tax debt
content: Boxing legend Floyd Mayweather Jr is once again in legal trouble after a company accused him of not paying for private jet services. A complaint filed in Los Angeles County claims that Jet Set Aircraft Inc. is owed more than $105,000. The case is linked to a private charter flight in 2025. The lawsuit also names Mayweather’s company, TBE Aviation, and other individuals who were allegedly involved in arranging the trip.

title: Minnesota Vikings $15M quarterback tied to Matthew Stafford’s Los Angeles Rams
content: With Kyler Murray and Carson Wentz now in the Minnesota Vikings, J.J. McCarthy’s time with the franchise may be coming to a close. USA TODAY predicts a draft-day trade for McCarthy. ESPN’s Bill Barnwell suggests a trade package sending McCarthy to the Matthew Stafford-led Los Angeles Rams for a higher draft pick. This move could allow McCarthy to develop under head coach Sean McVay. As McVay turned around Baker Mayfield’s career, he could do the same with McCarthy.

content: Stock market recommendations: Sona BLW Precision Forgings, Deepak Nitrite, and Vindhya Telelinks are the top stock recommendations from Mehul Kothari, DVP - Technical Research at Anand Rathi Shares for April 15, 2026. Let’s take a look:

title: Champions League: Atletico Madrid edge Barcelona 3-2 on aggregate to enter semis
content: Barcelona took an early lead through Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres inside the first 24 minutes. However, Ademola Lookman scored for Atletico, which proved enough after their 2-0 win in the first leg.

title: 'Won't prepare breakfast tomorrow': Bengaluru woman smothers 13-year-old daughter, dies by suicide
content: A Bengaluru homemaker tragically smothered her 13-year-old daughter before taking her own life. The devastating discovery was made by the husband's brother after repeated calls went unanswered. Preliminary findings suggest the mother, reportedly suffering from depression, used a pillow on her daughter before hanging herself. The family had dined out the previous evening.

content: Member of Parliament M. Sribharat participated in multiple events across the Visakhapatnam North constituency, including programmes organised by community groups and civil society organisations

content: Females elephants are known to greet acquaintances even when they meet after years; the exchange involves flapping their ears and swinging their trunks from side to side

content: Kochi’s drinking water crisis continues as approval for a 190-MLD water treatment plant remains pending, while a ₹2,000-crore sewage treatment project aimed at improving the city’s sanitation system is also awaiting clearance

title: Indian Military Academy raise security violations in upcoming mall in Dehradun, says project allowed without Army’s NOC
content: A letter addressed to the District Magistrate Dehradun written on February 4, 2026, reads that as per the 2011 orders of Government of India, Ministry of Defence, a security clearance is required from Local Military Authority (LMA) for any construction within 100-500 meters of Defence Establishment

title: Telangana govt. to strengthen SHG brick units; ₹18 lakh subsidised loans for 736 units
content: District-wise field visits revealed that a total of 736 SHG-run cement brick units are currently operational across the State. Comprehensive data were collected from these units on investment needs, production capacity, labour requirements and operational constraints

content: For Iran, the Strait of Hormuz is an international strait as set out under international law predating UNCLOS. For the US, the Strait of Hormuz is an international strait requiring "transit passage," as per UNCLOS.

title: Indian-origin immigration judge fired by Trump admin. after blocking Palestinian's deportation
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. title: Fantasy baseball news: Merrill Kelly ready to return to rotation for Diamondbacks
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . a longtime starter whom most fantasy managers ignored for good reason . Eric Karabell Jakob Junis has never thrown particularly hard when compared to his peers, never piled on strikeouts and permitted nearly a hit per inning .

title: Keys to the offseason: Free agency and draft plans for every eliminated NHL team
content: the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs are about to begin, meaning 16 teams are looking forward to their shot at the best trophy in sports . how should they modify their rosters this summer via trades, free agency and the draft? read on for full breakdown on every team that is no longer eligible for the Stanley Cup in 2026 .

title: Fury is back at heavyweight; where does he land?
content: Tyson Fury ends his short-lived retirement by routing arslanbek Makhmudov . the win allows Fury to return to the rankings at heavyweight after a brief absence . "The Gypsy King" slots in at No. 2 behind the only man to have beaten him in his pro career, Oleksandr Usyk .

title: Over 100 viral videos, several minor girls: 19-year-old held in Amravati sexual abuse probe
content: accused Ayan Ahmed Tanveer Ahmed allegedly lured girls into relationships, then physically and sexually assaulted them while recording the act against their will . police sources say the accused is visible in some videos, and they suspect another accomplice might have helped film the sexual exploitation .

title: 'The ouch that runs his mouth': Hokit roars into MMA heavyweight rankings
content: the undefeated hokit defeats onetime heavyweight title challenger Curtis Blaydes . the two put on a slugfest for the ages, combining for a division-record 351 significant strikes . he finds himself at no. 7 in the heavyweight top 10 .

title: Predicting the entire NBA postseason -- with a surprise champion
content: the postseason is set to begin this week . we'll use ESPN's basketball power index to fill in the four teams projected to advance out of the play-in tournament . despite the gap in seeds, these teams have similar profile .
